$description: The Databricks platform shell — every product page lives inside this layout. Fixed header, fixed left nav, scrollable content surface.

shell.note: Viewport fills entire screen. No scrolling on shell — only content surface scrolls.

platformHeader.position: top of shell, not sticky (part of flex col)

left.content: Sidebar toggle (icon button) + Cloud badge (text 14px) + Databricks logo

center.placeholder: Search data, notebooks, recents, and more...

right.content: Catalog selector (ghost select) + Genie button + App grid button + Avatar

page.padding: pb-2 pr-2 (8px bottom, 8px right, NO top, NO left)
page.note: min-h-0 is critical — allows flex-1 child to shrink and enable scrolling

navbar.overflow: overflow-y-auto (nav can scroll if too many items)
navbar.collapsible: toggled by sidebar button in header

section.header: Hint style (12px muted-foreground) + ChevronDown, px-2 py-1

contentSurface.overflow: overflow-y-auto (THIS is where page content scrolls)
contentSurface.note: Content ALWAYS scrolls within this surface. Platform header and navbar remain fixed. The white surface is the application viewport.

rules: Shell background is bg-muted — the grey surround. Content surface is bg-background — the white area.
Only the content surface scrolls. Header and navbar are always visible.
Navbar is fixed 180px width. Content surface fills remaining space.
Content surface has 8px margin on top (from page padding), right, and bottom. Left edge is flush with navbar.
Platform header is 48px tall, edge-to-edge, no border-bottom (muted bg provides visual separation).
Search bar is centered in header, fixed 552px width.
Nav items are 28px tall, icons are 16px, text is 13px Paragraph.
Active nav item uses bg-accent + text-accent-foreground + font-semibold.
Section headers use Hint style (12px, muted-foreground) with ChevronDown.

tailwind.navbar: flex flex-col w-[180px] shrink-0 gap-4 px-2 overflow-y-auto
tailwind.content: flex-1 min-w-0 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background border border-border rounded-[8px] shadow-md
